title: HitColor
description: A lightweight pvp mod made to change the color or transparency of your hit on a player.
body:
A lightweight pvp mod made to change the color or transparency of your hit on a player.

**Features:**
- Allows change of hit color to any color on weel
- Allows change of transparency of hits

**Upcoming Updates:**
- Adding a hit armor feature
- 1.21x support

_Orginally ported from https://modrinth.com/mod/hitcolor Author: harimasa_
